name: The Gabelli Global Utility and Income Trust Series A Cumulative Puttable and Callable Preferred Shares
summary: The Gabelli Global Utility and Income Trust Series A Cumulative Puttable and Callable Preferred Shares represents a preferred equity security issued by The Gabelli Global Utility and Income Trust. These shares pay a fixed dividend rate and have no maturity date, although they may be redeemed by the issuer. The Gabelli Global Utility and Income Trust is a closed-end fund that invests in global utility and income-producing securities.
